Description: A lightning-fast tackle that always strikes first.
DescriptionEn: A lightning-fast tackle that always strikes first.
DescriptionFr: Un plaquage éclair qui frappe toujours en premier.
DescriptionEffects: Deals 28 physical damage to one enemy.
DescriptionEffectsEn: Deals 28 physical damage to one enemy.
DescriptionEffectsFr: Inflige 28 dégâts physiques à un ennemi.
